creator: jon@xyinn.org
text: Unless what you meant was that the patch is working in that, yes, tank/os is being displayed because it is a dataset that could successfully boot (assuming the efi partition and loader are properly installed), but the tank/home dataset should actually be filtered out. I would agree with that, although I don't know if the current implementation goal is to simply be a "dumb" frontend to set the bootfs zfs property, or if it should be smarter about what datasets it allows you to activate.
